rationale_source: R4-RESIDUAL-2 PNW-only existing-first-mortgage extraction × F1.EL bank-vs-private distinction

mortgage_position.rationale: F1.MP new 2nd; new 2nd lender (Centum Private) is separate from existing 1st (RBC).

must_include.rationale: ASSERTION-2: new 2nd lender distinct from existing 1st.
